localized_texts.text: Tropical Spice Garden Entrance Tickets & Guided Tours

23 NOVEMBER 2025Entrance to the garden is complimentary for The Fam Weekend. Check out this link for list of experiences availablehttp://tsgspicefam.com/fam-weekendTropical Spice Garden is a botanical garden located in Penang, Malaysia, that is dedicated to showcasing the diversity and importance of the region's spices and herbs. The garden covers an area of eight acres and is home to a wide variety of tropical plants, including over 500 species of herbs and spices from around the world.The garden is designed to be both beautiful and educational, with a range of attractions and activities for visitors of all ages.Tropical Spice Garden also offers a range of activities and workshops for visitors, including guided tours, cooking classes, and even a chance to make your own natural soap using herbs and spices from the garden.Overall, Tropical Spice Garden is a must-visit destination for anyone interested in the natural beauty and rich cultural heritage of Penang and Malaysia. It's a unique and educational experience that offers something for everyone, whether you're a seasoned gardener, a foodie, or simply looking to relax and enjoy the beautiful surroundings.
Tropical landscape of 8 acres and a home to a wide variety of tropical plants including over 500 species of herbs and spices from around the world.
Garden is designed to be both beautiful and educational with a range of attractions and activities for visitors of all ages.
Located in Penang Malaysia dedicated to showcase the diversity and importance of region's spices and herbs.
Showcase the extensive collection of tropical plants, herbs, and spices found within the garden.
the opportunity for visitors of all ages to engage with the natural world and learn about the importance of conservation.
Asia's Hidden Eden. Where nature meets wellness, adventure, play and culture. Penang, Malaysia.
Last admission is one hour before closing
How to use: Show Mobile Ticket: Ticketing counter
How to use: Show mobile ticket

Terms & Conditions: Ticket valid for 45 days from Date of Issue Child age is 4 - 12 years old Adult age is 13 years and above Senior is recognized as 60 years and above Student can use senior ticket. Please show valid student ID Guided tours will start punctually. Please endeavor to be on time as arriving late may result in a forfeited tour or to be pushed to a later tour time _____________________________________________________________________________________________ Scan this QR code for TSG audio guide available in 7 languages. Download to use the guide offline. There is limited internet/ Wi-Fi connection within the gardens
Cancellation Policy: Free cancellation till validity ends.
What’s included: Standard Admission
